ALERT_EMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: your Gmail App Password (not your regular password - generate one at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords)

_settings_reference.INCLUDE_GENERAL_JOB_BOARDS: Set to true to include filtered Indeed/LinkedIn/Glassdoor university-context results; false scans university/association boards only.
_settings_reference.ALERT_STATUS_SMS_HOURS: Optional routine SMS heartbeat. 24 means one 'still alive' text about once per day; 0 disables it.
_settings_reference.ALERT_STATUS_EMAIL_HOURS: Optional routine email heartbeat. 24 means one 'still alive' email about once per day; 0 disables it.
_settings_reference.ALERT_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: Optional Telegram bot token for phone push notifications when new postings are found.
_settings_reference.ALERT_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: Optional Telegram chat ID to receive short hit notifications; full links still go by email.

_carrier_gateways_reference._note: number is your 10-digit phone number, no dashes/spaces. A few carriers have discontinued email-to-SMS - if texts never arrive, verify with your carrier.
